display_information.name: navi
display_information.description: 🧚‍♀️ a friendly helper to guide you through the day-to-day noise of code review
display_information.long_description:
a friendly helper to guide you through the day-to-day noise of code review. navi hooks up to a source (github/gitlab/gitea) and destination (email/slack/discord) to let you know when you have pending code reviews, replies to your comments, and more. this software is free, open-source, highly configurable, and runs locally!

see https://larakelley.com/posts/navi for more 🧚‍♀️
